title: Odal Node — Textile Sector Data (v1.2.0)
description: Textile-specific fields for EU textile DPP compliance. v1.1.0 adds SCIP/SVHC substance disclosure, per-fibre origin traceability, durability metrics, and microplastic shedding data. v1.2.0 renames countryOfManufacturing to countryOfOrigin for cross-sector naming consistency.

fibreComposition.description: List of fibres and their percentage composition. Must sum to ~100%.

fibre.description: Fibre name, e.g. cotton, polyester, recycled_polyester.

countryOfOrigin.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where this fibre was sourced.
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where the textile was manufactured.

careInstructions.description: ISO 3758 care symbols or free text care instructions.

chemicalComplianceStandard.description: Chemical compliance standard, e.g. OEKO-TEX 100, REACH, GOTS.

recycledContentPct.description: Total recycled content as a percentage of total weight.

carbonFootprintKgCo2e.description: Carbon footprint in kg CO2e per unit.

waterUseLitres.description: Water consumption in litres per unit produced.

microplasticSheddingMgPerWash.description: Microplastic fibre shedding in milligrams per wash cycle (ISO/DIS 4484).

durabilityScore.description: Durability score (0–10) covering pilling, colour fastness, dimensional stability, seam strength.

expectedWashCycles.description: Expected number of wash cycles before significant quality degradation.

countryOfRawMaterialOrigin.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country of raw material origin (product-level fallback).

svhcSubstances.description: SVHC substances present above 0.1% w/w (REACH Art.33 / ECHA SCIP). Null = not yet checked. Empty array = checked, none found.

concentrationPct.description: Concentration in the article as weight-%.

locationInProduct.description: Where in the product the substance is found, e.g. coating, dye, finish.

sparePartsAvailable.description: Whether spare parts or replacement components are available.

allergens.description: Contact allergens regulated under REACH Annex XVII entry 72 (e.g. certain disperse dyes, chromium VI, nickel in accessories).

substancesOfConcern.description: Restricted substances not classified as SVHC but regulated under sector-specific rules (e.g. PFASs, flame retardants, biocides).

recyclabilityClass.description: Recyclability classification, e.g. mono-material, multi-material, not-recyclable.

endOfLifeInstructions.description: How to dispose of or recycle the product. Free text or URL to take-back/collection point information.

reuseCondition.description: Condition grade of a refurbished or reused product, e.g. like-new, good, fair.

priorUseCycles.description: Number of prior ownership cycles (0 for new products).

repairHistoryUrl.description: URL or structured log of repair events performed on this specific item.

repairCount.description: Number of completed professional repairs on this item.

pefScore.description: Environmental impact score per garment lifecycle (PEF/OEF methodology). Dimensionless single score aggregating multiple impact categories.
